name: vireon
description: Root scripts for Vireon client and server

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client"
scripts.dev:all: npm run install:all && npm run dev
scripts.start:all: npm run install:all && npm run start
